title: Craft-able Spawn Eggs
description: This mod makes spawn eggs craftable
body:
This mod makes spawn eggs craftable including a Secret Crafting recipe made for technoblade. I do want to give credit to modrinth.com/user/Jodek for some of the crafting recipe ideas. 

if you want the latest versions to this mod go to his mod https://modrinth.com/datapack/craft-spawn-eggs to get them.

I have made a discord server where you can see **ALL** the crafting recipes here is the link [https://discord.gg/UbPywERWPC](https://discord.gg/UbPywERWPC) You can also complain for me to add some mobs I accidentally forgot to add.
